note: Beat reporter definitions for parallel agent show generation

beats.name: AI & Technology
beats.editorial_notes: Feature high-signal essays and technical breakthroughs. Prioritize pieces getting discussion across rationalist/tech circles over generic news summaries.

beats.name: Prediction Markets & Trading
beats.editorial_notes: Focus on TRADING discussion — positions, strategies, specific markets, edge. Frame regulatory stories through the trader lens. Include specific quotes from podcast/stream transcripts.

beats.name: NBA & Sports
beats.editorial_notes: Trades, transactions, notable storylines. Pull specific analyst quotes from podcast transcripts. Connect to prediction market angles where applicable.

beats.name: Entertainment & Film/TV
beats.editorial_notes: Industry news, deals, greenlights, box office. Kyle is a screenwriter/producer — engage at that level. Matthew Belloni and Puck are highest signal.

show_structure.intro: Cold open with the biggest story, then show name + date
show_structure.segments: 4-7 segments across beats, each with specific quotes from sources
show_structure.quick_hits: 2-3 shorter items that didn't warrant full segments
